who: billing administrators at small law firms processing 5–15 invoices/month
offer: For billing administrators at small law firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient compilation of billing time-sheets causes cash flow gaps. We automate time-sheet preparation instead of manual compilation using spreadsheets.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for billing administrators
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to billing administrators with demo video
Share insights in community forums for billing tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry of time data on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short user interviews for feedback
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Set default reminder schedules for users
Enable CSV import for existing time data
Streamline onboarding process for new users
